content: Better Auth session management: listSessions() returns all active sessions for user; revokeSession(token) ends a specific session; revokeOtherSessions() kills all but current; revokeSessions() kills all. multiSession plugin: listDeviceSessions(), maximumSessions option (default 5). Session revocation on password change via revokeOtherSessions:true. GitHub issue #6940 notes sessionId parameter support being added to revoke-session. Bulk revocation via issue #6224.
